rationale.fidelity: Preserves supplier quantities, capacity, the robust coverage set, stated objective, realized demand as a state, and the conditional nature of guarantees inside the uncertainty set.
rationale.managerial_framing: Clearly explains resilience versus conservatism and its cost mechanism; actor, timing, and a concrete alternative uncertainty-budget counterfactual are somewhat implicit rather than fully developed.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Not applicable: no scholarly positioning or novelty claim is requested or made.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Explicitly calls calibration an unsupported modeling assumption, restricts the guarantee to the chosen set, and identifies the empirical inputs required before practical resilience claims.
rationale.prose_clarity: Concise and precise, with one minor encoding artifact.
rationale.overall: A compact, highly faithful robust-optimization framing with excellent treatment of the uncertainty-set boundary.
